prompt: Audita as rules em .claude/rules/ — quais estao sendo seguidas, quais nao, quais estao desatualizadas ou tem gaps.

assertions.text: Produces a compliance matrix with status per rule
Identifies at least 1 stale or outdated rule element
Identifies at least 1 gap (error pattern with no covering rule)
Does NOT auto-modify any rule files
Proposes concrete updates for stale/gap rules
